hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && ([ -f wiki/hot.md ] && echo '--- Hot Cache ---' && cat wiki/hot.md || echo '[hot cache empty]') && ([ -f 'brain/North Star.md' ] && echo '--- North Star ---' && cat 'brain/North Star.md' || true) && ([ -f work/Index.md ] && echo '--- Active Work ---' && head -60 work/Index.md || true)

hooks.prompt: Context was lost to compaction. Silently re-read wiki/hot.md, brain/North Star.md, and the active section of work/Index.md to restore context. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && [ -d .git ] && git add wiki/ work/ brain/ team/ .raw/.manifest.json 2>/dev/null && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "wiki-graph: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null) || true
